name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-7
title: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md does not document how dispatcher materializes B/B item locally
description: Wave 4 dispatch experience: rabbit-feature-touch SKILL.md says 'pass the item dir path on the dedicated branch' for --linked-item, but the dedicated branch (bug-backlog-files) isn't checked out in the dispatcher's working tree. Caller must materialize the item locally — Wave 4 ended up inventing .rabbit/rabbit/features/<feature>/<type>s/<id>/ to mirror the rabbit-file storage layout. SKILL.md should explicitly document the materialization step (the caller fetches the item.json from bug-backlog-files into a working-tree mirror at the expected path layout, then passes that path to --linked-item). Pairs with TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-? (dispatch path validation). Cosmetic-but-real friction; will bite every future B/B-linked dispatch until documented.
